# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function factorial: int (n: int)
  entry:
      STORE 1, [result]
      STORE 1, [i]
      JUMP L1
  L1:
      LOAD t1, [i]
      LOAD t2, [n]
      t3 = CMP_LE t1, t2
      JUMP_IF_NOT t3, L3
      JUMP L2
  L2:
      LOAD t4, [result]
      LOAD t5, [i]
      t6 = MUL t4, t5
      STORE t6, [result]
      LOAD t7, [i]
      t8 = ADD t7, 1
      STORE t8, [i]
      JUMP L1
  L3:
      LOAD t9, [result]
      RETURN t9

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t10 = CALL [factorial], 5
      RETURN t10
